parts.text: "Project @pdb/ does not compile. Plan: 1) Run mvn compile in the project @pdb/ to get the compilation errors only. 2) Generate a JavaParser source code transformation to fix the errors.    - Use the project in folder @/workspace/javaparser-base-template/ as the base project template.    - Use JavaParser AST manipulation to create the transformation.    - Save the transformation rules inside the folder @/workspace/javaparser-base-template/, e.g., in /workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java.    - Use the JavaParser API documentation located in folder /workspace/javaparser-api-docs/ for reference. 3) Ensure the generated transformation compiles correctly. 4) Apply the transformation to fix the compilation errors. 5) Verify that the project now compiles successfully with mvn compile. "

This is a complex multi-step task. Let me break it down:

1. Run `mvn compile` in the project at `/workspace/pdb/` to get compilation errors
2. Generate a JavaParser source code transformation to fix the errors using the template project
3. Save the transformation rules in the template project
4. Ensure the transformation compiles correctly
5. Apply the transformation to fix the compilation errors
6. Verify the project compiles successfully

Let me start by creating a todo list and then running the initial compilation to see what errors we're dealing with.
